entry.title: Why is the first column in my tree table not visible in the personalisation settings?
entry.content:
I have a smart table - tree table like this ->

However, when I click on the personalisation settings button, I do not see the Column -> "code" over there.

I am not sure why it is happening, as its not happening with a specific column, but any column that is at index 0

entry.title: SAPUI5 Issues with adding object as CustomData value
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to assigned an object to a CustomData value and as specified in the documentation that's possible as long as not written to html. So, this seems to be working both in XML and JS:

<Input>
    <customData>
        <core:CustomData key="myCustomData" value="{ myProperty: 'myValue' }"/>
    </customData>
</Input>
new sap.m.Input({
    customData: [
        new sap.ui.core.CustomData({ key: "myCustomData", value: { myProperty: 'myValue' } }),
    ],
});

Result:

{
    "myCustomData": {
        "myProperty": "myValue"
    }
}

But, I am having issues due to conflicts with the binding related object property names, such as 'path'. So for example, if I replace 'myProperty' with 'path', the result is:

<Input>
    <customData>
        <core:CustomData key="myCustomData" value="{ path: 'myValue' }"/>
    </customData>
</Input>
{
    "myCustomData": null
}

For XML, it looks like I can overcome this by using the same approach as for the documented SmartTable p13nData, and escape the object so it's stringified:

<Input>
    <customData>
        <core:CustomData key="myCustomData" value='\{"path": "myValue"}'/>
    </customData>
</Input>
{
    "myCustomData": "{\"path\": \"myValue\"}"
}

But for JS, I cannot figure out how to do it to keep it a string:

new sap.m.Input({
    customData: [
        new sap.ui.core.CustomData({ key: "myCustomData", value: JSON.stringify({ path: 'myValue' }) }),
    ],
});
{
    "myCustomData": null
}

I am not sure whether doing this is bad or not and also afraid of other possible conflicts in the future (if my object property name becomes a binding relevant name).

entry.title: How to fill the search field using semantic navigation to the Fiori Elements App?
entry.content:
Hello Fiori Elements Experts,

you might have already seen the Search field (UI5 Documentation: Enabling the Search Function) that appears when the OData Service used provides this functionality:

In my project I have the requirement to allow the creation of a link that would use the semantic Object and Action of the app and pass the value that should be searched as an additional parameter. For Property Values that works without any problem. But I haven't found a way to populate the Search field. I've tried parameter name "search" which is the name of the element, also I've tried "$search" which is name used when I store a variant of a search where Search is filled.

Looking forward for your input.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: How to access Work Zone Content from the Configuration Editor?
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

first time posting, so please excuse possible mistakes in posting this question. 

I'm facing the following problem. I developed an UI Integration Card in SAP Business Application Studio, which makes use of the Configuration Editor, when imported into SAP Work Zone AE. Despite the shown possibilities, I don't understand how I can make content, residing in a Work Zone workspace, accessable in this Configuration Editor. What I'm aiming for, would be something similar to the Configuration Editor of the Rotating Banner Widget: 

I would appreciate it very much, if someone could nudge me into the right direction on how to face this problem. What I saw by inspecting our Work Zone instance, is the content_ajax calls made by Work Zone to fetch the content data. But how I could make them usable in the Configuration Editor, is out of my current understanding. 

Thank you very much in advance. 

Max

SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition SAPUI5 SAP Business Application Studio

entry.title: XML Templating error
entry.content:
Hi all,

I try to use the XML templating to reuse a table fragment in the IconTabBar.

I use xmlns:template="http://schemas.sap.com/sapui5/extension/sap.ui.core.template/1" in the Tab xml:

 

<mvc:View
    controllerName="ui5.walkthrough.controller.Tab"
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:template="http://schemas.sap.com/sapui5/extension/sap.ui.core.template/1"
    displayBlock="true">
    <Page title="{i18n>homePageTitle}">
        <content>
            <IconTabBar id="candidateModelMappingTab" expanded="true" class="sapUiSmallContentPadding">
                <items>
                    <IconTabFilter icon="sap-icon://work-history" text="JobApp" tooltip="JobApp">
                        <template:with var="target">
                            <core:Fragment fragmentName="ui5.walkthrough.view.Field" type="XML"/>
						</template:with>
                    </IconTabFilter>
                </items>
            </IconTabBar>
        </content>
    </Page>
</mvc:View>

 

and create a view in Component.js:

 

      createContent : function () {
         return _XMLView.create({

				viewName : "ui5.walkthrough.controller.Tab"
			});
     }

 

 

 But I get an error as follow:

 Is there any body can give me some help?

entry.title: How to add Date Range filter in Column header of ui table(sap.ui.table)
entry.content:
I am trying to add a Date Range filter in the column header of an sap.ui.table.Table. The solution I found in this SAP Community post seems to be outdated and doesn't work with the latest SAP UI5 versions.

Is there an updated approach to implement a Date Range filter directly in the column header? Ideally, I would like to use sap.m.DateRangeSelection or a similar control that fits within the sap.ui.table.Column. How can this be achieved while ensuring compatibility with recent UI5 versions?

Any help or working example would be much appreciated!

entry.title: Configure Text Orientation using Annotation without Custom Column
entry.content:
Hi,

in our Smart Table, we have the requirement to have a string value oriented to the right side of a column.

As far as I understood, strings are always oriented to the left side of a column

We're currently only using annotations and I would like to achieve this without creating a custom column. Ist this possible?

Any Input is much appreciated!

entry.title: How to add External Libraries to a SAP Fiori Elements App .
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to integrate third party libraries to SAP Fiori Element App.

App is launched via FLP. It's not loading the libraries properly when it is loaded via extended controller file or from Component.JS.

As of now I am trying to load it via onInit or onBeforeRendering to load let's say a google map via CDN.

UI Version: 1.108.23

 

jQuery.sap.includeScript("https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/js?key=""&loading=async&libraries=geometry", 'googleMaps', this.initializeMap.bind(this));

initializeMap: function () {
			var map = new google.maps.Map(this.getView().byId("idmap").getDomRef(), {
				center: { lat: -34.397, lng: 150.644 },
				zoom: 2
			});
		}

 

Also, in a different scenario when app to app navigation is enabled ...unless there is hard refresh on the second app's object page where a third-party library is loaded...it is not loading the library.

Wondering if it's a Bug or a known issue which is resolved. 

Any recommendations. @pmuessig 

Thanks,

Abhi

entry.title: Webclient-Deployment of an Extension - sap.insights missing
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I recently developed an application using SAPUI5, which works as expected during development. Now I wanted to deploy my application to a SAP Business One WebClient, but can't seem to get it to work.

I have used the following command for building my application:

ui5 build --config=ui5.yaml --clean-dest --dest dist

 The file "ui5.yaml" contains the following contents:

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: myApp
type: application
framework:
  name: SAPUI5
  version: 1.123.2
  libraries:
    - name: sap.m
    - name: sap.ui.core
    - name: sap.f
    - name: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    - name: sap.ui.comp
    - name: sap.ui.generic.app
    - name: sap.ui.table
    - name: sap.ushell
    - name: themelib_sap_horizon
    - name: sap.insights
server:
  customMiddleware:
    - name: fiori-tools-proxy
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        ignoreCertError: true
        ui5:
          path:
            - /resources
            - /test-resources
          url: https://ui5.sap.com
        backend:
          - path: /b1s
            url: https://x.x.x.x:x
    - name: fiori-tools-appreload
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        port: x
        path: webapp
        delay: 300
    - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-middleware
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        debug: true
        excludePatterns:
          - /Component-preload.js
    - name: fiori-tools-preview
      afterMiddleware: fiori-tools-appreload
      configuration:
        component: myApp
        ui5Theme: sap_horizon
builder:
  customTasks:
    - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-task
      afterTask: replaceVersion
      configuration:
        debug: true

Then I used the VS Code Plugin outlined in this chapter to package my build into an MTAR-archive. So far I haven't encountered any error yet. Then I used the ExtensionManager to import the MTAR-file and assigned the extension to a CompanyDB.

However, when attempting to open the extension, I encountered two errors:

  • The WebClient showed me a popup containing the following detail: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#webclient-myApp-myApp".
  • My browser console writes, that the package sap.insights is missing. I haven't used this package explicitly in my project, so I assume, that it must be the dependency of another dependency.

I have tried multiple things so far:

  • Downgrading the SAPUI5-version used in the build to 1.120.4.
  • Using a self-contained build and including all dependencies.
  • Explicitly including the dependency sap.insights during the build.

None of these things have worked. I checked the available modules on my WebClient and sap.insights isn't amongst them. However, I can't seem to include it myself, as the resources seemingly are embedded in the file "gate.jar" and I don't think it's a good idea to alter and recompile it.

Please let me know if you have an idea on what I'm doing wrong or what I could try next, as this issue is somewhat urgent.

Thanks in advance,

Thomas

entry.title: Deploy SAPUI5 app to S4HANA cloud system
entry.content:
Is it possible to deploy SAPUI5 app to s4hana cloud system.

I only found ways of deploy to Cloud Foundry and ABAP repository (on-premise) system.

If possible, could you please provide me step by step documentation.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: How to Upload a File in a RAP Freestyle V2 Application?
entry.content:
I'm working on reading data from an Excel file, but due to customer restrictions, I'm unable to use third-party libraries. My approach is to upload the Excel file to the backend, process the content there, and then send the data back to the frontend.

I am using UploadSet for the file upload, and while the upload process claims to be successful, the corresponding table in the backend is not being populated. I also tried using unmanaged save with RAP, but the code doesn't seem to be triggered when I attempt to upload the file.

Doe anyone know how to handle this scenario or what I am doing wrong?

Sample Codes:

UploadSet:

 

<upload:UploadSet
  id="idAttach"
  instantUpload="false"
  uploadEnabled="true"                         
  uploadUrl="/sap/opu/odata/sap/SERVICE/InvoiceAttachSet"
  mode="None">
</upload:UploadSet>

 

Upload JS:

 

onUploadBtn: function(){
  var oAttachmentUpl = that.getView().byId("idAttach"); 
  var aIncompleteItems = oAttachmentUpl.getIncompleteItems();
  var iIncompleteItems = aIncompleteItems.length;

  for(var i = 0; i < iIncompleteItems; i++){
    var sFileName =  aIncompleteItems[i].getProperty("fileName");
    var oXCSRFToken = new sap.ui.core.Item({
      key: "X-CSRF-Token",
      text: that.getOwnerComponent().getModel("SERVICE").getSecurityToken()
    });
    var oSlug = new sap.ui.core.Item({
      key: "SLUG",
      text: sEingangnr + "/" + sFileName
    });
                
  oAttachmentUpl.addHeaderField(oXCSRFToken).addHeaderField(oSlug);
  oAttachmentUpl.uploadItem(aIncompleteItems[i]);
  oAttachmentUpl.removeAllHeaderFields();
  } 
}

 

RAP Behavior Definition:

 

managed implementation in class xxx unique;
strict ( 2) );

define behavior for xxx alias Excelupload
with unmanaged save
lock master

authorization master ( instance )
{
 create;
 update;
 field (readonly) Equnr;
}

entry.title: The UploadSet control in SAPUI5 cannot upload files properly
entry.content: I'm using "sap.m.upload.UploadSet" and when click on upload button to upload files from local folder or laptop folder, the pop-up appears twice. On the second upload, the file appears as uploaded and showing the file name in the list. Please suggest to resolve this problem, Thanks.

entry.title: Implement the compar feature in UI5
entry.content:
Hello,
I am interested in developing a viewport in ui5.
I would like to apply the [visual compare] function in SAP VEV to UI5 viewport.

First of all, I know that ui5 is using the viewport threejs library.
I understand that there is a way to compare two models using the [Three-bvh-csg] library in threejs.
Attached is the link below:
https://discourse.threejs.org/t/three-bvh-csg-a-library-for-performing-fast-csg-operations/42713

Additionally, the VEV attaches the [visual compare] function as an image.
It would be nice if you could give me a hint or help on how I can combine the gray and blue models in the image.

entry.title: Minimum Quantities in INFO RECORD and MM
entry.content:
Minimum Quantities in REG INFO and MM

We are experiencing issues when processing purchase orders, as the minimum order quantity in the Info Record is purely informational and not considered when placing orders. The data is being pulled from the MRP1 tab. I understand this shouldn't be the case, as we have several suppliers for the same item, and each has a different minimum order quantity.

Please, we need the Info Record to take precedence over the material master data. Could someone assist us with this?

Thank you,

entry.title: Action precheck doesn't flag the fields on the screen (Fiori Elements w/ RAP service)
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to implement a precheck on my Behavior Def. to prevent an action from getting fired before a certain condition is met.

BehDef. - precheck for GetQuotes action

Beh. Imp. - I'm filling the reported and failed tables with the fields that have failed to meet the condition (ie. Terminal, CounterParty, ContractDateTime) 

The $batch request response sent from the S/4HANA system when this validation error occurs is the following:

 

{"error":{"code":"SABP_BEHV/100","message":{"lang":"en","value":"Please fill all mandatory fields to get quotes"},"innererror":{"application":{"component_id":"","service_namespace":"/SAP/","service_id":"xxxxx","service_version":"0001"},"transactionid":"F147E0AD61C60120E0066DF79D7FC785","timestamp":"","Error_Resolution":{"SAP_Transaction":"","SAP_Note":"See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (
https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)","Batch_SAP_Note":"See
SAP Note 1869434 for details about working with $batch (
https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1869434)"},"errordetails":[{"ContentID":"id-1726152164082-309","code":"SABP_BEHV/100","message":"Please
fill all mandatory fields to get quotes","propertyref":"","severity":"error","transition":true,"target":"ContractDatetime","additionalTargets":["Counterparty","Terminal"]}]}}}

 

 There we can see the targets were mapped correctly: "..."target":"ContractDatetime","additionalTargets":["Counterparty","Terminal"

I'm expecting this to be enough for the Fiori Elements framework to interpret the error content and flag the target fields on the screen but it doesn't happen. Instead, it just shows a message on a popup.

Is there any other way to flag the wrong fields on the screen?

entry.title: How can I get the user's plant (store)?
entry.content:
Hello SAP's gurus.

I'm developing a Fiori app, and I need to get the plant from the user data.

In the transaction FBP_MAINTAIN_PERS_S with the personalization dialog "DIA_LO_SRS", I can set up the plant (store) for the user.

Is there an odata service that returns the plant (store)?

Best regards,

Victor Carmona.

entry.title: Assign default value to field in Fiori Elements
entry.content: Can a default value be assigned to a field on an object page in the create option from the front-end in SAP Fiori Elements?

entry.title: SAPUI5 PDFViewer Not Working : Underlying iframe was not found in DOM.
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm currently working on a SAPUI5 application that needs to display a PDF from the ABAP backend.

The OData Service is OK. Tests with Gateway Client are positive.
Just one point : I had to adapt the content-disposition to pass ‘inline’ instead of 'attachment' on ABAP system (SEGW)
>>> In order to display my PDF in the SAPUI5 application and no longer download it.

Now, I'm encountering another error in my SAPUI5 application
>>> FYI My SAPUI5 Version is "1.120.0"

The PDFViewer say "The PDF file could not be loaded."
And in the console I see the error message "Underlying iframe was not found in DOM."
My OData request is OK. The problem seems to be with my SAPUI5 application.

The code is relatively basic.
A PDFViewer on a view with setSource and setVisible, I also tried with Open method but same error.

I found the SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3429273/E but the properties "isTrustedSource" does not seem to be available with my version of SAPUI5 ("1.120.0").

I also tested my application with SAPUI5 version"1.120.20" on SAP BAS, In this case, I receive the message "Download the file to view it".
>>> Downloading works well, but that's not the purpose of the application.

How can I display the PDF content directly in the application?
In my case, downloading is not an option ...

Thanks in advance for your help.
YouriC

entry.title: Responsive Smart Table AutoColumnWith with full screen size
entry.content:
Hi, we're currently creating Responsive UI5 applications.

I really like the concept of AutoColumnWidth adjusting the columns according to the content sizes. Also there is a nice table propery "customizeConfig" seting AutoColumnWith for all Columns

However, when I set enableAutoColumnwith="true", the table does not fill the sceen anymore.


This is a requirement for us and I wonder if it's possible to have a column adjust to the remaining screen size automatically

Any input is much appreciated!

entry.title: Is there a way to prevent ObjectPageSubSection from promoting to ObjectPageSection?
entry.content:
According to SAPUI5 documentation, if there is only subsection within a section, its title is displayed instead of the section title. I wanted a way to disable that, or at least to workaround it, because my screen needs to be something like the image below, where both the title of the section ("Section 1") and the subsection ("Subsection") are displayed. I managed to do that only because I inserted a second subsection, but I want this behavior to persist even if there is only one subsection.

As reference, this is what happens now when there is only one subsection:
